claim: Deficiency of Tetraspanin-3 causes improved stem cell-renewal and slows disease propagation.

result.claim: Deficiency of Tetraspanin-3 causes improved stem cell-renewal and slows disease propagation.
result.reasoning: Multiple searches for "Tetraspanin-3," "Deficiency of Tetraspanin-3 causes improved stem cell-renewal and slows disease propagation," and "Tetraspanin-3 stem cell renewal disease propagation" did not yield any specific information regarding the role of Tetraspanin-3 in stem cell renewal or disease propagation. The search results primarily discussed other tetraspanins (e.g., CD82, CD53, CD9) and general aspects of tetraspanin function or stem cell biology, but no direct evidence was found to support or refute the claim about Tetraspanin-3.

evidence.text: Interactions between tetraspanins within TEMs were reported to be disrupted by Triton X-100 but preserved in the presence of Brij variants.
